indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_audit_entry_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_audit_entry" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_audit_entity" ON "trading_card_audit_entry" ("entity_type", "entity_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_set_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_set" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_set_identity" ON "trading_card_set" ("game", "language", "provider_set_code") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_global" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("provider", "comparison_value") WHERE language IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_language" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("provider", "language", "comparison_value") WHERE language IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_card_set_id" ON "trading_card" ("card_set_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_deleted_at" ON "trading_card" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_identity" ON "trading_card" ("card_set_id", "card_number_normalised") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_trading_card_rarity_mapping_pair
checks.expression: (rarity is null and rarity_icon_key is null) or (rarity is not null and rarity_icon_key is not null)
checks.definition: check (((rarity is null and rarity_icon_key is null) or (rarity is not null and rarity_icon_key is not null)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_rarity_raw_pair
checks.expression: (rarity_raw is null and rarity_comparison is null) or (rarity_raw is not null and rarity_comparison is not null)
checks.definition: check (((rarity_raw is null and rarity_comparison is null) or (rarity_raw is not null and rarity_comparison is not null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_variant" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_variant" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_identity" ON "trading_card_variant" ("trading_card_id", "condition", "finish", "special_treatment") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_sku" ON "trading_card_variant" ("sku") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_trading_card_variant_price_lock_consistency
checks.expression: (price_locked and price_locked_at is not null and price_locked_actor is not null) or (not price_locked and price_locked_at is null and price_locked_actor is null and price_lock_reason is null)
checks.definition: check (((price_locked and price_locked_at is not null and price_locked_actor is not null) or (not price_locked and price_locked_at is null and price_locked_actor is null and price_lock_reason is null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_trading_card_variant_id" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("trading_card_variant_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_provider_identifier" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("provider", "provider_identifier") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
